{{Quote|Empress, given the size of that fleet, we may not be able to defend our ''own'' worlds!|Vontaige|<ref name="encounter" />}}
'''Vontaige''', a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] native of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Empress Teta/Legends|Koros Major]], and served the ruler of the [[Empress Teta system/Legends|Koros system]], [[Empress/Legends|Empress]] [[Teta/Legends|Teta]]. In [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]], faced by a surprise invasion of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] by [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Naga Sadow/Legends|Naga Sadow's]] [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]], Vontaige attended a meeting with Teta and several others regarding the conflict which would come to be known as the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]].

==Biography==
Vontaige was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Tetan/Legends|native]] to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Empress Teta/Legends|Koros Major]] in the [[Empress Teta system/Legends|Koros system]]. He served [[Empress/Legends|Empress]] [[Teta/Legends|Teta]], the ruler of the seven unified worlds of the Koros [[Star system/Legends|system]]. Vontaige served under Teta in the [[Unification Wars (Koros)/Legends|Unification Wars]] of the Koros system, [[Battle of Kirrek (Unification Wars)|fighting]] against rebels on the world of [[Kirrek]]. Teta was victorious in the Unification Wars, and Vontaige returned to his place at her side as one of her top advisors. In [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]], the [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]], led by [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Naga Sadow/Legends|Naga Sadow]], launched the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]], a surprise invasion of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Although Empress Teta had already been forewarned, the size of the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] invasion force seemed to be overwhelming.<ref name="encounter" />

After the Great Hyperspace War's first [[Battle of Coruscant (Great Hyperspace War)|outbreak]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], Vontaige attended a meeting with Teta; [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Odan-Urr/Legends|Odan-Urr]]; [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] explorer [[Jori Daragon]], who first warned of the Sith threat; [[Llaban]], former leader of the Kirrek rebel forces; and several other advisors. During the meeting, Vontaige expressed concern that the Koros military didn't have enough firepower to defend their worlds. He also admonished Llaban, telling him that he and his rebels had dealt enough damage. However, Teta forced Vontaige to allow Llaban to speak, and Llaban offered to bolster Teta's military with the addition of his rebel [[Army/Legends|army]] from Kirrek. Teta accepted and dispatched Llaban to command his forces on Kirrek.<ref name="encounter" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|Llaban, you and your rebels have caused enough damage!|Vontaige|<ref name="encounter" />}}
Vontaige was fiercely loyal to the Empress. Due to the Unification Wars, Vontaige held great disdain for Llaban, who led the resistance to Teta's rule on Kirrek, and believed that he should not be allowed to participate in the war with the Sith. Vontaige was worried about the size of the Sith [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] compared to the reduced strength of Koros' [[Navy/Legends|navy]].<ref name="encounter" />

Unlike other Republic soldiers who wore an oval jewel on their helmet, Vontaige had a square-shaped jewel, denoting his higher rank.<ref name="encounter" />

==Behind the scenes==
Vontaige appeared in the third issue of [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire|''Tales of the Jedi: The Fall of the Sith Empire'']], a story arc of the [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (comic series)|''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series, written by [[Kevin J. Anderson]], illustrated by [[Dario Carrasco, Jr.]], and released in [[1996]].<ref name="encounter" />

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 3|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 3]] {{1st}}
